label: Testing
description: Adds a test folder and a README so you can start organizing test cases.

files.content:
# Tests

Use this folder for test suites, fixtures, and test notes.

label: Documentation
description: Adds a docs folder to expand project documentation without touching existing files.

files.content:
# Documentation

Use this folder for guides, references, and project notes.

label: Docker
description: Adds Docker starter files for container-based workflows.

files.content:
# Docker

Use this folder for container support files.

label: CI/CD
description: Adds a GitHub Actions workflow folder for continuous integration.

files.content:
# Workflows

Use this folder for GitHub Actions workflows and automation notes.

name: CI

on:
  push:
  pull_request:

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - run: npm install
      - run: npm test
